zh.lifeSummary: 當Derbail ingen Toirdelbaigh O'Brien於大約1046年出生在愛爾蘭萊音斯特時，她的父親Toirdhealbach Ua Briain High King of Ireland38歲，母親Derbforgaill ingen Tadhg Mac Giolla Pádraig36歲。她於大約1069年與Finn mac Dunlaing O'Caellaide在愛爾蘭結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於大約1116年在愛爾蘭享年72歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Derbail ingen Toirdelbaigh O'Brien于大约1046年出生在爱尔兰萊音斯特时，她的父亲Toirdhealbach Ua Briain High King of Ireland38岁，母亲Derbforgaill ingen Tadhg Mac Giolla Pádraig36岁。她于大约1069年与Finn mac Dunlaing O'Caellaide在爱尔兰结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于大约1116年在爱尔兰享年72岁。

nameMeanings.name: O'Brien
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Brendan, Dermot, Liam, Brigid, Declan, Donovan, John Patrick, Kieran, Colm, Donal, Brennan, Caitlin.

Irish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Briain ‘descendant of Brian’, a personal name probably based on the element bre- ‘hill’, with the transferred sense ‘eminence’, i.e. ‘exalted one’. See also Bryan . In Ireland there has also been some confusion with O'Byrne (see Byrne ).
History: This name is borne in particular by one of the greatest of Irish septs, descendants of Brian Boru, who rose to the high kingship of Ireland in 1002.

variants.name: O'Bryon
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish William Kevin.

variants.name: Bryan
meanings: English and Irish: variant of   Bryant  .
Irish: shortened Anglicized form of Ó Briain, see O'Brien .

variants.name: O'Briant
meanings: Irish: variant of O'Brien , with excrescent -t.

variants.name: McBrien
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Brendan, Seamus.
Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac Briain ‘son of Brian’. See O'Brien and Bryan .

variants.name: O'Bryan
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish James Patrick, Padraic.

nameMeanings.name: ingen
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Variant of   Ingegerd   and   Ingrid  , attested from the 16th-century.

en.lifeSummary: When Derbail ingen Toirdelbaigh O'Brien was born about 1046, in Leinster, Ireland, her father, Toirdhealbach Ua Briain High King of Ireland, was 38 and her mother, Derbforgaill ingen Tadhg Mac Giolla Pádraig, was 36. She married Finn mac Dunlaing O'Caellaide about 1069, in Ireland. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 1 daughter. She died about 1116, in Ireland, at the age of 72.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Derbail ingen Toirdelbaigh O'Brien est née environ 1046, à Leinster, Irlande, son père, Toirdhealbach Ua Briain High King of Ireland, avait 38 ans et sa mère, Derbforgaill ingen Tadhg Mac Giolla Pádraig, avait 36 ans. Elle a épousé Finn mac Dunlaing O'Caellaide environ 1069, à Irlande. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée environ 1116, à Irlande, à l’âge de 72 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Derbail ingen Toirdelbaigh O'Brien um 1046 in Leinster, Irland geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Toirdhealbach Ua Briain High King of Ireland 38 und ihre Mutter Derbforgaill ingen Tadhg Mac Giolla Pádraig 36. Sie hat um 1069 in Irland Finn mac Dunlaing O'Caellaide geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb um 1116 im Alter von 72 Jahren in Irland.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Derbail ingen Toirdelbaigh O'Brien è nata il circa 1046 nel Leinster, Irlanda, sua padre, Toirdhealbach Ua Briain High King of Ireland, aveva 38 anni e sua madre, Derbforgaill ingen Tadhg Mac Giolla Pádraig, aveva 36 anni. Lei sposato Finn mac Dunlaing O'Caellaide circa 1069, nel Irlanda. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 1 figlia. Morì circa 1116, nel Irlanda, all'età di 72 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Derbail ingen Toirdelbaigh O'Brienが約1046年にアイルランドレインスターで生まれた時，父Toirdhealbach Ua Briain High King of Irelandは38歳，母Derbforgaill ingen Tadhg Mac Giolla Pádraigは36歳であった。約1069年にアイルランドでFinn mac Dunlaing O'Caellaideと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は約1116年にアイルランドで72歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Derbail ingen Toirdelbaigh O'Brien(이)가 대략 1046년 아일랜드 레인스터에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Toirdhealbach Ua Briain High King of Ireland(은)는 38세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Derbforgaill ingen Tadhg Mac Giolla Pádraig(은)는 36세였다. 그녀는 대략 1069년 아일랜드에서 Finn mac Dunlaing O'Caellaide(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 대략 1116년 아일랜드에서 72세의 나이로 사망했다.

mg.about 1046–about 1116: tany ho any amin'ny 1046–tany ho any amin'ny 1116

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Derbail ingen Toirdelbaigh O'Brien nasceu aproximadamente 1046, em Leinster, Irlanda, seu pai, Toirdhealbach Ua Briain High King of Ireland, tinha 38 anos e sua mãe, Derbforgaill ingen Tadhg Mac Giolla Pádraig, tinha 36 anos. Ela casou-se com Finn mac Dunlaing O'Caellaide aproximadamente 1069, em Irlanda. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 1 filha. Ela faleceu aproximadamente 1116, em Irlanda, com 72 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Derbail ingen Toirdelbaigh O'Brien родилась около 1046 г. в местности линстир, Ирландия, её отцу по имени Toirdhealbach Ua Briain High King of Ireland было 38 лет, а матери, которую звали Derbforgaill ingen Tadhg Mac Giolla Pádraig, 36. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Finn mac Dunlaing O'Caellaide около 1069 г. в местности Ирландия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь. Она умерла около 1116 г. в местности Ирландия в возрасте 72 лет.

sm.about 1046–about 1116: e tusa o le 1046–e tusa o le 1116

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Derbail ingen Toirdelbaigh O'Brien nació aproximadamente 1046, en Leinster, Irlanda, su papá, Toirdhealbach Ua Briain High King of Ireland, tenía 38 años y su mamá, Derbforgaill ingen Tadhg Mac Giolla Pádraig, tenía 36 años. Se casó con Finn mac Dunlaing O'Caellaide aproximadamente 1069, en Irlanda. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 1 hija. Murió aproximadamente 1116, en Irlanda, a la edad de 72 años.
